violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw beef stored next to raw chicken and ground pork in walk in cooler. Store raw meats according to cook temperatures.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Date marking of food items not accomplished.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard boxes cut and used as shelf liner above reach in prep table cooler on prep line.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Area around fryers and cooking equipment have a buildup of food debris and grease and needs cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood drain rail and back splash has an accumulation of grease and needs cleaning.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Large refuse can placed in front of hand sink. Keep hand sink easily accessible.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand soap missing from hand sink near reach in freezer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor has an accumulation of food and grease under fryers and needs cleaning.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
